description_long: This is a modern residential house complex set within a fenced lot, featuring multiple interconnected flat-roofed structures surrounded by landscaped gardens and mature trees. The property includes a driveway with parked cars, a sidewalk, and a street lined with streetlights. Outdoor amenities such as a swimming pool, circular water features, and a wooden deck with seating are visible, enhancing the recreational appeal. The house itself is predominantly white and gray, with large windows and open green spaces between the buildings. The perimeter is defined by a combination of solid and transparent fencing, providing both privacy and visibility. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open layouts, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, multi-structure house complex with flat roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, and outdoor amenities like a pool and deck, all enclosed by a stylish fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with cars, sidewalk, and streetlights, with the house and gardens set back from the road.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a pool, deck, and extensive greenery, as well as the back facades of the house structures.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the property, the arrangement of buildings, and the fenced boundary with visible garden features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garden, pool, and deck area, with a clear look at the side entrances and additional parking space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door with a flat overhang, direct access from the driveway, and minimal decorative elements.
